concept_caption: Very high growing-season vegetation vigor (NDVI >0.64)
Very low growing-season vegetation vigor (NDVI <0.42)
Very high vegetation greenness during long rains (Mar-May NDVI >0.65)
Very low vegetation greenness during long rains (Mar-May NDVI <0.46)
Very high vegetation greenness during short rains (Sep-Nov NDVI >0.65)
Very low vegetation greenness during short rains (Sep-Nov NDVI <0.36)
Strong long-rains green-up response (NDVI MAM minus JJA >0.15)
Weak or absent long-rains green-up (NDVI MAM minus JJA <-0.10)
Strong short-rains green-up response (NDVI SON minus DJF >0.12)
Weak or absent short-rains green-up (NDVI SON minus DJF <-0.16)
Very high dry-season greenness (Dec-Feb NDVI >0.63, evergreen/perennial cover)
Very low dry-season greenness (Dec-Feb NDVI <0.45, bare/deciduous surface)
Very high tree or agroforestry canopy cover (>9%)
Very low tree canopy cover (<1%, open cropland)
Very high total precipitation in growing season (>1780 mm), associated with moist vegetation conditions
Very low total precipitation in growing season (<735 mm), associated with water-limited vegetation
Very high number of wet days in growing season (>201 days), persistent moisture conditions
Very low number of wet days in growing season (<104 days), intermittent rainfall conditions
Very high climatic moisture deficit (>775 mm), drought-stress-prone vegetation
Very low climatic moisture deficit (<410 mm), low drought stress
Very high growing-season maximum temperature (>27.0°C), heat-stress-prone vegetation
Very low growing-season maximum temperature (<23.7°C), cool growing conditions
Very high growing degree days (>2750), high thermal accumulation
Very low growing degree days (<2025), limited thermal accumulation
Very high elevation (>1795 m), highland agricultural landscape
Very low elevation (<1275 m), lowland agricultural landscape
Very high topographic diversity, complex terrain landscape
